backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a product catalog with admin-gated CRUD operations and Stripe payment integration (checkout session creation and status retrieval) using access control and HTTP outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for passing quantity through the FeaturesPage → CheckoutPage → PaymentSuccess flow via URL params, affecting CheckoutPage.tsx and PaymentSuccess.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's role and recent changes, serving as a human-readable index of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with viewport meta, the page title 'AIron - Automatic Ironing Machine', and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that creates a TanStack Router instance from the route tree and renders it via RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared page layout providing a fixed dark header with logo, desktop nav links, a mobile hamburger drawer, logout button, and an Outlet for child routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status derived from the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching user roles, admin status, Stripe configuration, and creating checkout sessions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Google Fonts, and defines a permanent dark premium theme with custom OKLCH color tokens and reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Multi-step checkout page (contact → payment method → confirm) with a simulated payment flow that navigates to success or failure routes.
frontend/src/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx: Product features and specifications page for the AIron machine, including a quantity selector and an order button that navigates to the checkout page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects to the product page upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying an error message, common failure reasons, and action buttons to retry checkout or return to the features page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays an order confirmation page after successful payment, showing quantity-based pricing (₹20,000/unit), next-steps info (email, shipping, delivery), and a product summary with navigation back to the product page.
frontend/src/pages/ProductLandingPage.ts: Hero landing page for the AIron product featuring a full-screen background image, headline, feature highlights (AI Fabric Detection, Steam Control, Garment Protection), and navigation buttons to the features/checkout pages.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree for the app, mapping paths (/, /product, /features, /checkout, /payment-success, /payment-failure) to their respective page components with search param validation where needed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to/from sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), an oklch-based color palette (gold, silver, charcoal), custom shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 15) for the AIron multi-page product website, documenting architecture decisions, existing features, known issues (quantity not passing to PaymentSuccess), and a pending fix request.
